mapper.update: UPDATE equipment SET risk_level = #{riskLevel}, fault_type = #{faultType}, status = CASE WHEN #{riskLevel} = 'CRITICAL' THEN '점검요망' WHEN #{riskLevel} = 'HIGH' THEN '점검요청' WHEN #{riskLevel} = 'MEDIUM' THEN '점검요청' ELSE '정상가동' END WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId}
UPDATE equipment SET risk_level = 'LOW', fault_type = 'NORMAL', status = '정상가동' WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId}
